title: undefined: manifest error while compiling
body:
Hi, 
following the install how-to the `make bin/skopeo` fails with the error below.
It worked before commit `b10d3e43a45c28bbff89ec17d2b8973821aafaa3`.

```
CGO_CFLAGS="" CGO_LDFLAGS="-L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -lgpgme -lassuan -lgpg-error" GO111MODULE=on go build -mod=vendor "-buildmode=pie" -ldflags '-X main.gitCommit=b10d3e43a45c28bbff89ec17d2b8973821aafaa3 ' -gcflags "" -tags "  " -o bin/skopeo ./cmd/skopeo
# github.com/containers/skopeo/cmd/skopeo
cmd/skopeo/copy.go:197:27: undefined: manifest
make: *** [Makefile:134: bin/skopeo] Error 2
```

comments.body:
That command worked for me
Are you sure your checkout is correct?
Yes, I checked. Tests fail with same error https://github.com/containers/skopeo/runs/2525957097
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Tried reproducing this, but works just fine for me...
This was a bug in that single merge ( b10d3e43a45c28bbff89ec17d2b8973821aafaa3 ) and it was fixed a few days later in #1278 .
